Mr. David Udoumoh
1976 – 2026 · A life of purpose

His Story

A Life of Purpose, Faith & Love

Mr. David Udoumoh was born on September 19, 1976, in Akwa Ibom State, Nigeria. He was a man of deep faith, remarkable intellect, and a heart devoted to service and excellence. His life journey reflected dedication, humility, and an enduring passion for uplifting others through knowledge, leadership, and creativity.

David began his academic journey at State College, Ikot Ekpene, where he obtained his Junior Secondary Certificate between 1988 and 1990. He proceeded to Federal Government College, Ikot Ekpene, from 1991 to 1993, earning his Senior Secondary Certificate. Driven by a passion for learning and growth, he attended the University of Calabar from 1999 to 2004, where he obtained a Bachelor of Science degree in Economics.

During his National Youth Service in Baruten, Kwara State, David served as a teacher of English Language and Economics.
